sections.paragraph:
Original: עט

Transliteration: ‛êṭ

Phonetic: ate

BDB Definition:

  1. stylus
    1. iron stylus with diamond tip used to write on stone or metal
    2. reed pen used on a roll

Origin: from H5860 (contracted) in the sense of swooping, i.e. side-long stroke

TWOT entry: 1600

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
